book.title: Propiología
book.subtitle: My book — available on Kindle
book.metaDescription: Propiología: a transdisciplinary exploration of the concept of property as a human phenomenon. Available on Kindle.
book.bookTitle: Propiología: The Science of the Own
book.synopsis1: Propiología is a transdisciplinary exploration of the concept of property — not only in the legal and economic sense, but as a deep human phenomenon that runs through identity, culture, biology and social organization.
book.synopsis2: The book proposes an original theoretical framework for understanding how the appropriation of objects, ideas and territories has shaped human civilization, and how this impulse remains a fundamental force in contemporary society.
book.synopsis3: Written with academic rigor and narrative accessibility, Propiología combines perspectives from economics, psychology, philosophy, anthropology and neuroscience to offer an integrated and novel vision of the concept of the own.
book.authorBio: Fernando Camacho Ospina holds a PhD in Applied Statistics in Biomedical Engineering (UNSW Sydney) with over 25 years of experience in innovation projects, data analysis and research. Colombian-Australian, private pilot, and passionate about the intersection of technology, culture and human thought.
